title: Verify backend control of the incentive offer
description: Test the cancellation flow when the discount offer is disabled from the backend to ensure the user is not shown the offer pop-up.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is turned OFF via a backend flag/configuration.

steps.description: 2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.

expected_result: The user should proceed directly from the loss aversion step to the final cancellation confirmation/feedback pop-up, completely skipping the incentive offer screen.
